title: Update setupSidePanel() to replace 3 sidebar entries with single Categorization entry; remove Test Webhook from Maintenance group
description: Update setupSidePanel() in public/index.html to replace the three separate sidebar entries (Bulk Categorization, Batch Jobs, Individual Jobs) with a single 'Categorization' entry pointing to panel-categorization. Remove the Test Webhook entry from the Maintenance group. Preserve panel-reviews (US-0004) as a separate sidebar entry. Maintain the Categorizer / Special tools / Maintenance group structure and collapsible-section interaction model.
notes: Sidebar Categorizer group: 10 entries → 8 entries. Remove: panel-manual, panel-batch, panel-individual, panel-webhook (from Maintenance). Add: panel-categorization.
